<features>
- observable feature: the subject is a puppy
- observable feature: the puppy has a black muzzle and dark eyes
- observable feature: the puppy has a fluffy, light brown coat
</features>
<kb>
- IF [subject is a puppy AND black muzzle AND fluffy coat] THEN [19]
- IF [subject is a cat] THEN [32]
- IF [subject is a cat AND yawning] THEN [26]
- IF [subject is a cat AND lying next to a yellow bowl] THEN [20]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the subject is a puppy with a black muzzle and a fluffy coat, matching the features of class 19.
</rule_check>
<response>19</response>

</kb>
